spec_for: Onboarding Wizard — Step 38 of 48-step build plan

wizard_overview.layout: Full-screen overlay on first login. Not accessible via sidebar until completed (or permanently skipped).
wizard_overview.progress_indicator: Top progress bar showing Step N of 5 + step names
wizard_overview.persistence: Each step auto-saves on Next click. Resume from last incomplete step on re-login.
wizard_overview.skip_policy: Steps 3 and 5 are skippable. Steps 1, 2, 4 are required.

steps.name: Organisation Profile
steps.on_next: Validate required fields. Save. Show step 2.

steps.name: Departments
steps.ui: Add department cards dynamically. Each card: name (text) + head_user (optional, filled after Step 3). Preset suggestions: Accounts, HR, Legal, Operations, IT, Secretarial.
steps.on_next: Must have at least 1 department. Save all. Show step 3.

steps.name: Invite Team
steps.skip_behavior: Show banner on dashboard: 'You have no team members yet — Invite users'
steps.ui: Table with rows: email, name, role (dropdown), department (dropdown from step 2). Add row button. Bulk invite via CSV upload.
steps.on_next: If not skipped: send invite emails. Proceed to step 4.

steps.name: Compliance Categories
steps.ui: Card grid of compliance category types. Each card has icon, name, description, toggle. Multi-select allowed.

categories.name: Tax & GST
categories.description: GST returns, TDS, Income Tax, Advance Tax

steps.name: AI Compliance Library
steps.skip_behavior: Set org.ai_library_generated = false. Show banner on dashboard: 'Your compliance library is empty — Generate with AI or add manually.' Banner dismissible after 3 days.
steps.ui: Show summary: 'Based on your profile (Private Limited, Tax + Legal categories), we'll generate N compliance items for you.' Show estimated count. Single 'Generate Library' CTA button. Progress animation while generating (10-30 seconds).
steps.generation_logic: Call POST /api/ai/generate-compliance-library with org profile + selected categories. AI returns list of compliance items with title, due_date_formula, frequency, department, applicable_laws.

on_complete.toast: You're all set! Your compliance library is ready.

on_skip.toast: Welcome! Start by adding your first compliance item.

api_endpoints: GET /api/onboarding/status — returns current step, completed flag
PUT /api/onboarding/step/:stepNumber — save step data, advance step counter
acceptance_criteria: User cannot proceed past Step 1 without org_name, org_type, timezone, financial_year_start
User cannot proceed past Step 2 without at least 1 department
User can skip Step 3 and Step 5
Skipping Step 5 does NOT prevent dashboard access
Progress is saved if user closes browser mid-wizard
On re-login, user resumes from last incomplete step
After 3 wizard dismissals, permanent skip option appears
Confetti animation plays on final completion
AI library generation completes within 30 seconds or shows timeout error
